did_you_know.title: The U
did_you_know.text: The U.S. Supreme Court expands on its Brown v. Board of Education decision by ordering district courts and school districts to enforce educational desegregation "at all deliberate speed."
did_you_know.person: Supreme Court of the United States

did_you_know.title: The National Negro Committee, forerunner to the National Association for the Adv…
did_you_know.text: The National Negro Committee, forerunner to the National Association for the Advancement of Colored People (NAACP), convenes for the first time.
